remarks: Experience the best of coastal living in Stamford's sought-after Shippan WATERFRONT community. This beautifully maintained townhouse offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience just moments from beaches, marinas, parks, downtown Stamford, and Metro-North.  Designed for today's lifestyle, the spacious main level features an open-concept living and dining area, a well-appointed kitchen with granite countertops and stainless appliances, and a private balcony. Upstairs, the primary suite offers a private bath and a generously sized WALK-IN CLOSET. Plus a second bedroom and full bath. A versatile lower-level BONUS ROOM is perfect for a HOME OFFICE, gym, or flex space, while the rare ATTACHED 2-CAR GARAGE provides exceptional convenience and storage. An oversized attic adds even more storage options. Enjoy the best of Stamford's vibrant waterfront lifestyle with nearby Czescik Park (outside your front door), Cove Island Park, Cummings Park, Chelsea Piers, Harbor Point, waterfront dining, and marinas all within minutes. Commuters will appreciate the quick drive to Stamford Transportation Center, offering frequent Metro-North express service to New York City, and Amtrak to everywhere.  Whether you're seeking a full-time residence or a low-maintenance coastal retreat, this home offers an exceptional opportunity in one of Stamford's most desirable waterfront communities.
